norb 2022/03/31 15:44
It is like the future of dynamite. Glow or Sine looks like the future. Not too “heavy”. "Disco" dance has been given here for some time. Without clarity, life is difficult. There are many challenges. We have a need for "transparency" and urgency. We have many goals. The "purpose" has become a little "silence". As much as possible, I "change" life. Bring 'the kingdom.' The future is like “digital”. Know “Generation”! You too "prophesy," and prophesy. The future is "modern" to "background recording". The "zone" is good. This is like "believing all together" in life. The big thing. Talk about "Universe". We do not change "anything" to more "intoxication." We are "invincible" and there is no "broken" heart. "Everything" will be "OK". "At any time," I described my life as an "activity" on the edge of life on Earth. "Something" just like that. "To the unknown" in "My way". - Wasiur Rahman -
